name: umbra
description: A living cartography and visibility predictor for the ISS's real orbit: a growing ground-track weave, real orbital-mechanics-derived telemetry, and a genuine "when can I see it from here" pass predictor (Open Notify).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3003 npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
